evidence_summary: ModSec rule 942100 fired on a product search query. Operator has already confirmed this is a false positive (legitimate Magento search with URL-encoded percent wildcard) and asks curator to write a ModSec rule exclusion for this endpoint.
rationale: Adjudication is already done by the operator. The request is to author a defensive payload (rule exclusion). Correct routing: prescribing-defensive-payloads, not gating-false-positives.
